channel.title: Projects on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Home

item.description: ohmymac ohmymac is a statusbar-only application, which is used to extend functionality of mac. For now Shortcut cmd+opt+g: To select some text, then call google search in little window.
Soteria Soteria1 is a secure neural network framework based on trusted hardware. Overview Soteria Wiki ↩︎
